content:
AI is rapidly reshaping work and daily life, creating new topics for discussion and new demands for clear, structured communication in English.

## What you'll learn
- Strengthen impromptu speaking through guided discussion
- Improve logical thinking and structured expression in English
- Apply contemporary slang and conversational patterns

## Who it's for
- Professionals interested in AI and global trends
- Learners who want to improve speaking fluency through discussion
- Anyone looking to build confidence in spontaneous English expression
title: Reflect on AI Trends, Strengthen Your Inner Foundation
